name: argos-erm
description: Check Point Argos ERM MCP Server for External Risk Management

options.help: Your Argos ERM instance URL. Format: https://<your_instance>.cyberint.io/. Found in your Argos ERM portal under account settings

options.description: Argos ERM API key for authentication
options.help: API authentication token for your Argos ERM instance. Generate from your Argos ERM portal under Integrations or API settings
Your Argos ERM customer ID. Required for all API calls. Found in your Argos ERM portal under account or tenant settings
